content.text:
I have called the manySchemasTool with valid sample data for all fields. Here’s a summary of the types of data provided:

- string: Sample text
- stringMin: Hello!
- stringMax: ShortText
- stringEmail: test@example.com
- stringEmoji: 😊
- stringUrl: https://example.com
- stringUuid: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
- stringCuid: cixlphn3l0000q9uwhgoboy4i
- stringRegex: test-abc123
- number: 42
- numberGt: 5
- numberLt: 3
- numberGte: 1
- numberLte: 1
- numberMultipleOf: 4
- numberInt: 7
- exampleArray: ["sample1", "sample2"]
- arrayMin: ["atleastone"]
- arrayMax: ["one", "two", "three"]
- date: 2024-06-11T12:00:00Z
- dateAfter: 2024-06-02T09:00:00Z
- dateBefore: 2024-06-01T10:00:00Z
- actualData: 2024-06-10T15:30:00Z
- object: { foo: "bar", bar: 12 }
- objectNested: { user: { name: "Al", age: 22 } }
- objectPassthrough: {}
- objectLoose: {}
- optional: null 
- nullable: null
- enum: A
- nativeEnum: B
- unionPrimitives: text
- unionObjects: { amount: 5, inventoryItemName: "ItemA" }
- record: [ { key: "first", value: "value1" }, { key: "second", value: "value2" } ]
- recordEnumKeys: { A: "Alpha", B: "Beta" }
- default: test

Let me know if you want to see this data in a specific format or need to test anything else!

content.text:
Here is the validated sample data returned by the manySchemasTool:

- string: "Hello, world!"
- stringMin: "Hello"
- stringMax: "ShortWord"
- stringEmail: "sample@example.com"
- stringEmoji: "😊"
- stringUrl: "https://example.com"
- stringUuid: "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000"
- stringCuid: "cklv5u9le00012v6wxdlhd8g0"
- stringRegex: "test-hello"
- number: 42
- numberGt: 5
- numberLt: 3
- numberGte: 1
- numberLte: 1
- numberMultipleOf: 4
- numberInt: 7
- exampleArray: ["apple", "banana", "cherry"]
- arrayMin: ["one"]
- arrayMax: ["one", "two", "three", "four", "five"]
- date: "2024-05-01T12:30:00.000Z"
- dateAfter: "2024-06-15T10:00:00.000Z"
- dateBefore: "2023-12-31T09:00:00.000Z"
- actualData: "2024-04-20T15:00:00.000Z"
- object: { foo: "bar", bar: 10 }
- objectNested: { user: { name: "Jo", age: 23 } }
- objectPassthrough: {}
- objectLoose: {}
- optional: (not set)
- nullable: null
- enum: "A"
- nativeEnum: "B"
- unionPrimitives: "hello"
- unionObjects: { amount: 100, inventoryItemName: "Widget" }
- record: { first: "one", second: "two" }
- recordEnumKeys: { A: "Alpha", B: "Beta" }
- default: "test"

Would you like an explanation of any specific field or the sample data as a whole?
